scripts.dev: bun run dev:web & bun run dev:api & wait
scripts.lint: bun run lint:oxlint && bun run lint:oxfmt
scripts.start: turbo run build && (bun run --cwd apps/api start & PORT=5174 bun run --cwd apps/web start & bun scripts/local-proxy.ts & wait)
scripts.test:coverage: turbo run test:coverage && mkdir -p coverage && bun scripts/normalize-lcov.ts $(find apps packages -name 'lcov.info' -path '*/coverage/*') && lcov-result-merger '{apps,packages}/*/coverage/**/lcov.info' coverage/lcov.info
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run lint:oxlint && bun run lint:oxfmt && bun run test && bun run test:integration && bun run knip
scripts.postinstall: test -n "$CI" || test -n "$DOCKER_CONTAINER" || env | grep -q ^DEPENDABOT || lefthook install

overrides.//: Patch vulnerable transitive deps. Run `bun audit` after removing any to check if still needed.
overrides.// @tanstack/query-core: Dedupe: query-db-collection and router-ssr-query peer-resolve an older query-core; TS treats identical-but-different-path type copies as distinct, collapsing createCollection generics to Record<string, unknown>.
overrides.// html2canvas: Redirect jspdf's optional html2canvas dep to html2canvas-pro (the version we already use directly).
